adoreme: was just reading my chinese books :)
C[dfunkt: in fullscreen mode the clock time should be center justified in it's feild
C[Tom Newman: Look to me like the entire line with name and time is jumping just
C[Tom Newman: A little. Could get Annoying.
C[anoek: i think we're going to get rid of the tenths, and we definitely need to fix it so it doesn't move the name when the time changes anyways
C[Tom Newman: Maybe try a fixed width font?
adoreme: it is a bit of a tricky fuseki
C[adoreme: ah forgot to submit the move

anoek: the little check box on the left of the board can toggle between those

C[adoreme: all your base belong to us :)

GN[13x13 ladder challenge: Traxtin vs adoreme]
C[doge_bot_2: Hi! This is bot. Join 'noob_bot' group and have fun!
C[oren: request for dev... unsplit the chats :)
C[oren: I don't really like the tenths of seconds personally
C[matburt: prozz barely getting out of time trouble there
prozz: i need to work on my game
C[adoreme: one of the left side buttons
C[adoreme: i have embarked on a risky journey after flipping the top
macelee: Indeed your plan was risky at the begining
adoreme: the top went sour for me with that one move hehe
macelee: yeah, the wall in the middle is too strong
macelee: you can let your opponent get that kind of wall
adoreme: was a no brain move from me :(
macelee: so the fight was risk free to me
adoreme: after j16 i was a bit out of options
adoreme: probably should have sacrificed three stones
macelee: controling the center is better
adoreme: that should have been my strategy hehe
adoreme: i started with that intention at least
macelee: anoek/matburt are you here watching?
macelee: there seems to be some disruption when playing
macelee: the textarea for chating seems to change its size a bit
macelee: I cannot say for sure
macelee: but when concentrating on the game, any change to other places is not a good thing
macelee: really happy you guys fixed the timer
macelee: I notice that when I have the list the list of users open
macelee: when somebody joins or leaves
macelee: then the textarea for below moves up and down
macelee: maybe that is what I experienced while playing
macelee: why cannot the user list be in a tab?
macelee: just like the Malkovich log, not taking the extra space
macelee: In fact I do not like having to scroll up and down to see things
macelee: should try to fit everything in a screen
macelee: I am a proper monitor or laptop screen
macelee: Do you think the text 'Game Finished', 'Move 144' and the navigation buttons taking too much space?
macelee: we are probably too demanding
macelee: I can see they've made great effort on the layout
macelee: In fact, the layout almost looks perfect if I maximize the window
macelee: why does it say ""Winner: White by Resignation""?
macelee: The ""Winner"" part, does it mean anything?
macelee: should be avoided if all possible
macelee: because there's another scroll bar for chat
macelee: so when using wheels to scroll, can get confusing result
macelee: if the chat scroll bar is in the middle, and you scroll down, when it reaches the bottom, the whole right panel scrolls
macelee: that is not the correct behaviour
macelee: hmm I might be wrong
macelee: can you group some functions into a menu that stays in a corner but can popup?
macelee: I am thinking of doing this in a simple SGF viewer
macelee: I try to do some advanced functions for my website, but hacking Eidogo player is too difficult
macelee: so I want to my own SGF viewer
macelee: In fact I have a preview screen I can show you
macelee: let me find the URL
macelee: It is a preview, I haven't hooked on any event handling
macelee: so the buttons won't work
macelee: and stones are randomly generated
macelee: what I am thinking is the the 'Options' button should align to the right, have a popup menu to hold additional functions
macelee: nice to talk to you
matburt: we'll look into that... I haven't seen that on mine
matburt: were you on full screen or not?
oren: hmm, chat area also gets autoscrolled to the bottom on new messages
matburt: gotcha... we'll get that fixed up for you
anoek: i think i know what you mean macelee
anoek: that's something i've been trying to root out for awhile now..
mlopezviedma: That sounds good to me too
mlopezviedma: The disadvantage is that you can't see the names while you're writing a message
mlopezviedma: I would put the users window below the chat window instead of above
mlopezviedma: Yeah, that's anoying too. True
mlopezviedma: Maybe the best way is like before, fixed on the right
mlopezviedma: I think it should say, on the same line: ""Game finished (Winner: White by resignation)""
mlopezviedma: Yeah, sure! But it can always be improved! =)
anoek: Indeed, it can always be improved!
anoek: Yeah we're a bit split on the text
mlopezviedma: If I didn't see a future on this server, I wouldn't help as much. =)
anoek: if we squish it it becomes more cluttered and harder to see is the thought
anoek: also more misclicks, especially on touch devices
anoek: but I do think it can still be improved
mlopezviedma: But I don't think the thing I pointed out squishes the layout
mlopezviedma: In fact, it makes the layoout constant when the game is finished
anoek: Oh game finished / move .. yeah maybe not, will have to try squishing that a little and see how it works
mlopezviedma: I don't know if I'm clear
anoek: tbh my lazyness is kicking in there a little, there are buttons and whatnot that appear there :) But that's no excuse.. will have to work on it some more
mlopezviedma: the move stays as is
matburt: it means the winner is white (you) because black resigned
mlopezviedma: Another thing: I think the users list is better like before, on the right, and fixed.
mlopezviedma: (or on the left, i dont know)
mlopezviedma: that way there are no size changes problems
anoek: Cool, yeah that was another lazyness thing.. that doesn't work for thinner monitors, but works well for widescreen
anoek: so i need to differentiate between the two and act accordingly
anoek: but yeah, that'll come back I think
mlopezviedma: Well, with macelee we agree in that scrolling should be avoided completely
anoek: Yeah that gets to be rather troublesome
mlopezviedma: well, everything is clear now. So we'll have to wait until anoek wants to work it out. =D
mlopezviedma: Congratulations on the new changes and features. They're reeeeally awesome
anoek: Thanks :) We worked hard on it
matburt: That's sorta the nature of how the browser reacts
anoek: We might be able to catch that event and stop it from propogating
anoek: but that is the default behavior
anoek: might be nice to stop it though..
mlopezviedma: That's why I think scroll should be totally avoided
anoek: well it can never be 100% avoided on all devices, some devices are pretty small :)
anoek: but agreed that we can do better
mlopezviedma: What about putting ""Analyse"" and ""Review"" buttons as small icons on the left??
anoek: Might should be we should hide those when their disabled, but when they're not they're pretty well used :)
matburt: Easily the most used elements outside of the game play itself

anoek: icons on the left are more for toggles.. i don't really even like having those on the screen, but we tried having a drop down and people couldn't ever seem to think to look under ""Options"" to do things like toggle fullscreen or turn off/on the sound, so we put in icons..
mlopezviedma: I would put them as small icons on the left, adding separators
matburt: people already have a really hard time with those icons on the left
anoek: what about for tablets and smartphones?
anoek: those icons get pushed down the bottom :)
anoek: they're not always on the left
mlopezviedma: really? I dont mind, I in fact love them
anoek: Alrighty, i've gotta get some work done, cya guys later :)
mlopezviedma: that would be good too, macelee
